title: Measurement of XylE (Catechol 2,3-Dioxygenase) enzyme activity by microplate reader
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6lkdf","text":"Simple measurement of XylE (Catechol 2,3-Dioxygenase) enzyme activity by microplate reader. Catechol 2,3-Dioxygenase can catalyze catechol (1,2-Dihydroxybenzene) to 2-HMS, which has a high absorbance at 377 nm, so we may use photometric mode of microplate reader to measure the concentration of 2-HMS, product of the enzyme.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"exhre","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"586p8","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"image","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"617060F7341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","height":142,"is_video":false,"legend":"{\"blocks\":null,\"entityMap\":null}","mime":"image/png","nestedSelector":null,"original_name":"diagram.png","placeholder":"https://content.protocols.io/public/feff27b656ae40ef44442ad86e3606ebd1b18385231b66d3c64b4fe0c5f83229/bsja9exe.png","shadow":false,"source":"https://content.protocols.io/public/feff27b656ae40ef44442ad86e3606ebd1b18385231b66d3c64b4fe0c5f83229/bsja9exe.png","width":648}}}}

steps: Shake the plate for 00:00:05 at 600 rpm .
Measure the absorbance of cell culture at 600 nm as the estimation of cell amounts.

Plate out and add 2.5 µL catechol ( 10 millimolar (mM) ) to every well, then plate in immediately. The working concentration of substrate is 0.25 millimolar (mM) here. Other working concentration could also work.
Shake the plate for 00:00:05 at 600 rpm .
Measure the absorbance of cell culture at 377 nm, continuously (like 00:00:10 per reading) or after a certain period of time (like 00:01:30 ).
Add 100 µL cell culture per well. It is recommanded to use replicates and controls to avoid mistakes or deviation.
Measure the absorbance of cell culture at 377 nm as the baseline of A377 before the reaction.
Normalize the A337 value by optical density at 600 nm. Make a Time-A377 plot like this: Or simply substract the absorbance before the reaction from the value after a specifc period of time:
Turn on the microplate reader and computer. Run the software to set the protocol and plate layout.
Export the data from the software. Properly dispose of the contaminated cell culture and microplates!
creator: Ji Gao
